name: Blizzard - 3 Day 2 Night Sailing Tour
description: Experience the Whitsundays in style aboard the Blizzard, a sleek and spacious Beneteau 50 sailing vessel. This adult-only adventure is perfect for solo travelers, couples, and small groups looking to explore hidden island gems and enjoy authentic sailing. With gourmet catering and opportunities to snorkel the vibrant Great Barrier Reef, this tour combines relaxation with adventure. Ideal for those seeking a luxurious yet thrilling escape, the Blizzard offers an intimate experience with no more than 10 guests onboard.
includes:
Meals and snacks
Linen and bath towel
Wet suit hire
Marine Park fees
Soft drinks, bottled water, and snacks
Snorkel gear, stinger suits, and tuition
Ample onboard cover from sun or rain
Hot showers and modern amenities
USB charging stations
highlights:
Visit both ends of Whitehaven Beach
Authentic sailing experience
No more than 10 guests
Delicious and fresh catering
Opportunity to snorkel the Great Barrier Reef
Family-owned and operated
Try your hand at sailing or relax
Experience the wonder of the Great Barrier Reef
price_tiers: Shared Accommodation: A$655 | Private Twin Cabin (for 2 people): A$870 | Private Double Cabin (for 2 people): A$870 | Private Double Ensuite Cabin (for 2 people): A$895
menu:
**Our Delicious Sample Menu**
Known for its delicious, freshly prepared menu, see the Blizzard Sample Menu for more information on catering.
ideal_for: Solo travelers, couples, and small groups seeking a luxurious and adventurous sailing experience.
